description: A time-traveling RPG where a group of friends must prevent the apocalypse caused by the alien entity Lavos.

eras.name: Prehistoric Era
eras.description: The age of dinosaurs and primitive humans

key_events.name: Meeting Ayla
key_events.description: Crono and Marle travel to 60000 BC and meet Ayla, the cavewoman leader.

key_events.name: Kashum Challenge
key_events.description: Defeat thereptile monsters to prove your worth.

eras.name: Medieval Era
eras.description: The age of knights and castles, ruled by Guardia

key_events.name: The Millenial Fair
key_events.description: The starting point - Crono meets Marle at the fair.

key_events.name: Time Travel Incident
key_events.description: Marle is transported to 1000 AD by the time machine, starting the adventure.

key_events.name: The Frog Cure
key_events.description: Find the materials to cure Frog's curse.

choices.text: Give the Green Dream to the Frog?

options.outcome: Frog joins as human, loses sword skills

options.text: No - Keep Frog as he is
options.outcome: Frog stays as knight, retains abilities

eras.name: Dark Ages
eras.description: The dark period when Guardia fell to the Kingdom of Guardia

key_events.name: Magus's Castle
key_events.description: Confront the Mystic Lord at his castle.

key_events.name: The Apocalypse
key_events.description: See the devastated future caused by Lavos.

eras.name: The Ocean Palace Era
eras.description: The final days before Lavos awakens

key_events.name: Lavos Awakens
key_events.description: The party travels to the Ocean Palace to stop Lavos from waking.

endings.name: The Cosmic Race
endings.description: Complete the race at the Sun Shrine to gain the ultimate power.
endings.outcome: Use the Chrono Trigger to erase Lavos from history

endings.name: The Moon Anchor
endings.description: Give the Moon Stone to the Guru.

endings.name: The Dream Project
endings.outcome: Lucca creates a new timeline where Lavos never existed

endings.name: The Legendary Hero
endings.description: Defeat Lavos with the Hero's Badge.

character_arcs.arc: Silent protagonist who learns about responsibility through time travel
Princess who discovers her true identity and learns about duty
Inventor who reconciles with her father's legacy
Cursed knight seeking redemption and honor
Robot who learns what it means to have a heart
Primitive warrior who values strength and honesty
Prince seeking revenge against Lavos, ultimately finding peace
